description.ko: 우주의 가장 먼 곳으로의 여정, 공허의 정적과 천체의 탄생과 파괴라는 격정적인 아름다움이 만나는 곳입니다.
description.en: A journey into the farthest reaches of the universe, where the silence of the void meets the violent beauty of celestial birth and destruction.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of the VOID-3 deep cosmic expanse, featuring a massive swirling nebula in shades of midnight blue and deep violet, a distant supermassive black hole with a glowing accretion disk, gravitational lensing effects warping the starlight, dense star fields and cosmic dust clouds, hyper-realistic, 8k, unreal engine 5 render, ethereal and majestic atmosphere.
